Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. No proof of service has been filed. COMMISSIONER: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is off calendar and dissolved per the Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Continued To Jun-24-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/24/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $410, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Vernon C. Goins II, of Taylor, Goins & Stallworth LLP Motion to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF ZIZI HAWTHORNE. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-02-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-21-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 318
